Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The gym is quiet. It might be[n]because exams are coming up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lively voices are coming from the gym. The[n]club members take their activities seriously...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the door to the gym. The kendo[n]team seems to be using it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a note that says, "Sorry, but the kendo[n]team is no longer recruiting new members."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}During lunch, students play basketball here.[n]After school, it is used by the kendo team...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's used for P.E. and as a training[n]ground for the kendo team...[n]{f 1 1}
